whatsapp.prefill_message: Hi Wameed Tech, I'd like to discuss a new project.

hero.title: Wameed Tech
hero.subtitle: وميض تك
hero.description: Custom websites, e-commerce, and mobile apps for Jordanian businesses — designed to convert and built to scale.

services.description: Wameed Tech is a web and mobile app development studio based in Amman, Jordan. We specialize in creating custom digital solutions that help businesses grow and succeed in the digital world.

items.title: Business Websites & Landing Pages
items.description: For businesses that need a fast, professional site that turns visitors into customers.

items.title: E-Commerce Stores
items.description: For retailers ready to sell online — stores that close sales and scale with you.

items.title: Web Apps & Dashboards
items.description: For teams that need custom tools, admin panels, and data dashboards built around their workflow.

items.title: Mobile Apps (iOS/Android)
items.description: For businesses that want to reach customers in their pocket, on both platforms.

items.title: Redesign & Maintenance
items.description: For an existing site that needs a modern refresh and reliable ongoing support.

values.label: Quality
values.value: Clean, maintainable code and best practices

values.label: Support
values.value: Ongoing support and maintenance after launch

work.description: We have had the pleasure of working with innovative companies across various industries.

projects.imageAlt: FlashWash website homepage showing the WhatsApp-based ordering flow and per-item laundry pricing
projects.name: Flashwash
projects.description: Wameed Tech designed and built the FlashWash website — a bilingual laundry and dry-cleaning platform centered on frictionless WhatsApp ordering. Customers book a pickup in one message; the site handles service browsing, transparent per-item pricing, and door-to-door delivery scheduling.

projects.imageAlt: Leap on Deals homepage showing the multi-category product marketplace and deal-of-the-day merchandising
projects.name: Leap on Deals
projects.description: Wameed Tech built Leap on Deals — a multi-category e-commerce marketplace with product browsing, deal-of-the-day merchandising, cart and wishlist, customer accounts, and full checkout across clothing, electronics, and more.

process.closing_line: Every project starts with a free scoping call.

cta.description: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how we can help your business grow.

form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Building digital solutions for businesses that dream big.
